mapper.insert:
insert into visitor_record
visitor_record_id, fingerprint, visitor_info_id , ipaddr, location, browser, os, visit_time, user_agent, total_views, blacklist, reason, create_time, is_deleted,
#{visitorRecordId}, #{fingerprint}, #{visitorInfoId}, #{ipaddr}, #{location}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{visitTime}, #{userAgent}, #{totalViews}, #{blacklist}, #{reason}, #{createTime}, 0,

insert into visitor_info
nickname, email, avatar, create_time, create_by, is_deleted,
#{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, 0,
mapper.update:
update visitor_record
blacklist = #{isBlacklist}, reason = #{reason},
where visitor_record_id = #{visitorRecordId} and is_deleted = 0
update visitor_record set total_views = total_views + 1 where visitor_record_id = #{visitorRecordId} and fingerprint = #{fingerprint} and is_deleted = 0

update visitor_info
nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where visitor_info_id = #{visitorInfoId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select visitor_record_id, ipaddr, location, visit_time, total_views from visitor_record
and visit_time >= #{startTime} and visit_time <= #{endTime} and ipaddr like concat('%', #{ipaddr}, '%') and location like concat('%', #{location}, '%') and blacklist = #{blacklist} and is_deleted = 0

select visitor_record_id, fingerprint, visitor_info_id, ipaddr, location, browser, os, visit_time, user_agent, total_views, blacklist, reason from visitor_record where visitor_record_id = #{visitorRecordId} and is_deleted = 0
select visitor_record_id,visitor_info_id from visitor_record where fingerprint = #{fingerprint} and is_deleted = 0
